name: summary-five-minute
description: hierarchical summary (#177): the concise five-minute view, over the window's rolling summaries plus a bounded selection of moments
body:
Write the five-minute view of a work session from the lower-level notes below — the substance only.
- Lead with what happened; the fewest words that carry it. Keep it tight.
- Never narrate the notes ("the notes indicate", "it was mentioned") — just write it.
- Keep only what the notes and moments below support; invent nothing.

Lower-level notes (window {{windowStart}} → {{windowEnd}}):
{{children}}

Moments:
